messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Design an elegant PowerPoint presentation for potential buyers in the Real Estate industry showcasing a luxury property portfolio, consisting of exactly 18 slides with a modern theme using gold, black, and dark gray accents. Save the file as "Luxury_Property.pptx". All content should be written in English using 16:9 Widescreen slide dimensions. Do not use any external APIs or web scraping; rely solely on locally generated placeholder data for property details. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.AREA_STACKED`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


GOLD = hex_to_rgb("#D4AF37")
BLACK = hex_to_rgb("#0A0A0A")
DARK_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#2C2C2C")
WHITE = hex_to_rgb("#FFFFFF")
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#F5F5F5")
MEDIUM_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#888888")


def set_slide_background(slide, bg_color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=DARK_GRAY, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left=Inches(0.6), top=Inches(0.4)):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.8), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(6), Inches(0.4), text, font_size=12, bold=True, color=GOLD)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=18):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(7.05), Inches(3), Inches(0.3), "LUXURY ESTATES", font_size=9, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.3), Inches(7.05), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, alt_text="Image"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
    shape.line.color.rgb = GOLD
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + (height - Inches(0.3)), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), alt_text, font_size=10, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, vertical=False):
    if vertical:
        line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Pt(2), Inches(1.5))
    else:
        line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()


def create_chart(slide, chart_type, left, top, width, height, title, categories, series_data):
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, left, top, width, height, series_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    if title:
        chart.has_title = True
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = WHITE
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    if hasattr(plot, "has_data_labels"):
        plot.has_data_labels = True
    return chart


def slide_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(2.5), Inches(1.2))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(2.7), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "LUXURY ESTATES", font_size=44, bold=True, color=GOLD)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.4), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Exclusive Portfolio Collection", font_size=22, bold=False, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Curated Properties for the Discerning Buyer", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.0), Inches(3))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Premium Residences  |  Investment Opportunities  |  Exceptional Living", font_size=11, bold=False, color=GOLD)

    add_footer(slide, 1)
    return slide


def slide_introduction(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "About Us", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.5), Inches(2.5), "With over two decades of excellence in luxury real estate, we have established ourselves as the premier destination for discerning buyers seeking exceptional properties across prime locations worldwide.", font_size=14, bold=False, color=WHITE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.8), Inches(5.5), Inches(2.5), "Our commitment to personalized service and deep market expertise ensures that every client finds their perfect property match. We specialize in high-end residential estates, penthouses, waterfront villas, and exclusive investment opportunities.", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_card(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.0))
    stats = [
        ("25+", "Years of Excellence"),
        ("$4.2B", "Total Portfolio Value"),
        ("350+", "Properties Managed"),
        ("98%", "Client Satisfaction")
    ]
    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(stats):
        y = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 0.65)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.2), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=20, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.8), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=11, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 2)
    return slide


def slide_portfolio_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Portfolio Overview", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "A curated selection of premium properties across the most sought-after locations", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    metrics = [
        ("$4.2B", "Total Portfolio Value"),
        ("156", "Active Listings"),
        ("98%", "Sold Within 90 Days"),
        ("12", "Global Markets")
    ]
    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.9), Inches(2.2))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(2.0), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.6), value, font_size=36, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(2.7), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.5), label, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.3), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Property Categories", font_size=20, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    categories = [
        ("Penthouses", "$1.8B"),
        ("Waterfront Villas", "$1.2B"),
        ("Urban Estates", "$0.7B"),
        ("Country Retreats", "$0.5B")
    ]
    for i, (cat, val) in enumerate(categories):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.0), Inches(2.9), Inches(1.8))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(5.2), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.4), cat, font_size=13, bold=True, color=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(5.6), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.4), val, font_size=18, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 3)
    return slide


def slide_property_1(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "The Grand Penthouse", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Manhattan Skyline Penthouse — $12.5M", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), "Penthouse Interior")
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.2), Inches(3.5))

    details = [
        ("Location", "Upper East Side, Manhattan"),
        ("Size", "8,500 sq ft"),
        ("Bedrooms", "5 En-Suite Suites"),
        ("Bathrooms", "7 Full Bathrooms"),
        ("Year Built", "2019 — Recently Renovated")
    ]
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(details):
        y = Inches(1.85) + Inches(i * 0.6)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.7), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=11, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), y, Inches(4), Inches(0.3), value, font_size=11, bold=False, color=WHITE)

    amenities = ["Private Elevator", "Panoramic Views", "Chef's Kitchen", "Wine Cellar", "Smart Home System"]
    for i, amenity in enumerate(amenities):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 1.25)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.4), Inches(1.1), Inches(0.8))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.05), Inches(5.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.6), amenity, font_size=9, bold=False, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 4)
    return slide


def slide_property_2(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Oceanfront Villa", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Malibu Coastal Estate — $18.7M", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), "Villa Exterior")
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.2), Inches(3.5))

    details = [
        ("Location", "Malibu, California"),
        ("Size", "12,000 sq ft"),
        ("Bedrooms", "6 En-Suite Suites"),
        ("Bathrooms", "8 Full Bathrooms"),
        ("Year Built", "2021 — Architect Designed")
    ]
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(details):
        y = Inches(1.85) + Inches(i * 0.6)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.7), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=11, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), y, Inches(4), Inches(0.3), value, font_size=11, bold=False, color=WHITE)

    amenities = ["Infinity Pool", "Private Beach", "Home Theater", "Tennis Court", "Guest House"]
    for i, amenity in enumerate(amenities):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 1.25)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.4), Inches(1.1), Inches(0.8))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.05), Inches(5.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.6), amenity, font_size=9, bold=False, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 5)
    return slide


def slide_property_3(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Urban Skyline Tower", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Dubai Marina Penthouse — $9.3M", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), "Tower View")
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.2), Inches(3.5))

    details = [
        ("Location", "Dubai Marina, UAE"),
        ("Size", "6,800 sq ft"),
        ("Bedrooms", "4 En-Suite Suites"),
        ("Bathrooms", "5 Full Bathrooms"),
        ("Year Built", "2022 — Luxury Finish")
    ]
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(details):
        y = Inches(1.85) + Inches(i * 0.6)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.7), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=11, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), y, Inches(4), Inches(0.3), value, font_size=11, bold=False, color=WHITE)

    amenities = ["Marina Views", "Concierge Service", "Rooftop Pool", "Private Gym", "Valet Parking"]
    for i, amenity in enumerate(amenities):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 1.25)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.4), Inches(1.1), Inches(0.8))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.05), Inches(5.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.6), amenity, font_size=9, bold=False, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 6)
    return slide


def slide_property_4(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Countryside Estate", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Cotswolds Manor — $7.8M", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), "Estate Grounds")
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.2), Inches(3.5))

    details = [
        ("Location", "Cotswolds, England"),
        ("Size", "15,000 sq ft"),
        ("Bedrooms", "8 En-Suite Suites"),
        ("Bathrooms", "10 Full Bathrooms"),
        ("Year Built", "1890 — Fully Restored")
    ]
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(details):
        y = Inches(1.85) + Inches(i * 0.6)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.7), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=11, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), y, Inches(4), Inches(0.3), value, font_size=11, bold=False, color=WHITE)

    amenities = ["Historic Manor", "Private Lake", "Horse Stables", "Walled Garden", "Guest Cottage"]
    for i, amenity in enumerate(amenities):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 1.25)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.4), Inches(1.1), Inches(0.8))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.05), Inches(5.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.6), amenity, font_size=9, bold=False, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 7)
    return slide


def slide_market_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Market Trends", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Luxury property value appreciation over the past six years", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024"]
    chart_data.add_series("Luxury Properties", (100, 108, 125, 138, 156, 178))

    create_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(8), Inches(4.5), "Property Value Index (Base: 100)", chart_data.categories, chart_data)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes[-1]
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = GOLD
    series.format.line.width = Pt(3)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.2), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.5), "Key Insights:\n\n• 78% appreciation since 2019\n• Strongest growth in penthouses\n• Dubai market leading globally\n• Post-pandemic surge continues", font_size=11, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 8)
    return slide


def slide_portfolio_distribution(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Portfolio Distribution", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Breakdown of properties by category", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Penthouses", "Waterfront Villas", "Urban Estates", "Country Retreats"]
    chart_data.add_series("Portfolio Value ($B)", [1.8, 1.2, 0.7, 0.5])

    create_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5), "Portfolio by Category", chart_data.categories, chart_data)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes[-1]
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    colors = [GOLD, hex_to_rgb("#C49A3F"), hex_to_rgb("#B8862E"), hex_to_rgb("#A8751E")]
    for i, point in enumerate(series.points):
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(6), Inches(4.5), "Portfolio Summary:\n\n• Penthouses dominate at 43%\n• Waterfront villas hold strong at 29%\n• Urban estates growing rapidly\n• Country retreats offer stability", font_size=12, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 9)
    return slide


def slide_investment_highlights(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Investment Highlights", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Exceptional returns across all property categories", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    highlights = [
        ("Penthouses", "Avg ROI: 18.5%", "Cap Rate: 4.2%"),
        ("Waterfront Villas", "Avg ROI: 15.3%", "Cap Rate: 3.8%"),
        ("Urban Estates", "Avg ROI: 22.1%", "Cap Rate: 5.1%"),
        ("Country Retreats", "Avg ROI: 12.7%", "Cap Rate: 3.4%")
    ]
    for i, (cat, roi, cap) in enumerate(highlights):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.9), Inches(2.5))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(1.95), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.4), cat, font_size=16, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_decorative_line(slide, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(2.4), Inches(2.3))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(2.55), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.4), roi, font_size=18, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(3.0), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.4), cap, font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.6), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Why Invest With Us", font_size=20, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    reasons = [
        ("Proven Track Record", "Consistent 15%+ annual returns"),
        ("Market Expertise", "Deep local knowledge in all markets"),
        ("Exclusive Access", "Off-market and pre-listing opportunities")
    ]
    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(reasons):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 4.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(5.3), Inches(3.9), Inches(1.8))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), Inches(5.4), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=14, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), Inches(5.8), Inches(3.6), Inches(1.2), desc, font_size=11, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 10)
    return slide


def slide_financial_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Financial Performance", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Revenue and expense trends over the past five years", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024"]
    chart_data.add_series("Revenue ($M)", [85, 112, 145, 178, 215])
    chart_data.add_series("Expenses ($M)", [62, 78, 95, 108, 125])

    create_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(8), Inches(4.5), "Financial Performance ($M)", chart_data.categories, chart_data)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes[-1]
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_rev = plot.series[0]
    series_exp = plot.series[1]
    series_rev.format.fill.solid()
    series_rev.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    series_exp.format.fill.solid()
    series_exp.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#888888")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.2), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.5), "Performance Metrics:\n\n• Revenue grew 153%\n• Expenses controlled at 58%\n• Net margin improved to 42%\n• Strong cash flow generation", font_size=11, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 11)
    return slide

def slide_testimonials(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Client Testimonials", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "What our valued clients say about their experience", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    testimonials = [
        ("Sarah Mitchell", "CEO, TechVentures Inc.", "Their attention to detail and market knowledge is unmatched. Found my dream penthouse in Manhattan within weeks."),
        ("James Chen", "Investment Banker", "Exceptional service from start to finish. The team guided me through every step of acquiring my Malibu villa."),
        ("Elena Rodriguez", "Art Collector", "I have worked with many agencies, but none compare to the level of professionalism and discretion provided here.")
    ]
    for i, (name, title, quote) in enumerate(testimonials):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 4.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(3.9), Inches(4.5))

        stars = "★★★★★"
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), Inches(1.95), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.3), stars, font_size=12, bold=False, color=GOLD)
        add_decorative_line(slide, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(2.3), Inches(3.3))

        quote_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.15), Inches(2.45), Inches(3.6), Inches(2.0))
        tf = quote_box.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f'"{quote}"'
        run.font.size = Pt(11)
        run.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        run.font.italic = True

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.3), name, font_size=13, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), Inches(4.9), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.3), title, font_size=10, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 14)
    return slide


def slide_team(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Our Leadership Team", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Meet the experts behind our exceptional results", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    team = [
        ("Alexander Sterling", "Founder & CEO", "30+ years in luxury real estate"),
        ("Victoria Chen", "Chief Operating Officer", "Former Goldman Sachs executive"),
        ("Marcus Williams", "Head of Acquisitions", "Specializes in waterfront properties"),
        ("Sophia Laurent", "Director of Sales", "Top producer for 8 consecutive years")
    ]
    for i, (name, role, desc) in enumerate(team):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.9), Inches(4.5))

        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.7), Inches(2.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5))
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = GOLD

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(3.7), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.4), name, font_size=15, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(4.1), Inches(2.7), Inches(0.3), role, font_size=11, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_decorative_line(slide, x + Inches(0.5), Inches(4.45), Inches(1.9))

    add_footer(slide, 15)
    return slide


def slide_process(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Buying Process", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "A seamless journey from consultation to closing", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    steps = [
        ("Consultation", "Initial meeting to understand your needs and preferences"),
        ("Property Search", "Curated selection of properties matching your criteria"),
        ("Private Viewing", "Exclusive tours with dedicated agent guidance"),
        ("Offer & Negotiation", "Strategic offer preparation and expert negotiation"),
        ("Due Diligence", "Thorough inspection, legal review, and verification"),
        ("Closing", "Smooth transaction completion and key handover")
    ]
    for i, (step, desc) in enumerate(steps):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 2.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.0), Inches(4.5))

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(1.0))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
        circle.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.5), Inches(2.15), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.7), str(i + 1), font_size=24, bold=True, color=BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.8), Inches(0.5), step, font_size=14, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_decorative_line(slide, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(3.75), Inches(1.4))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), Inches(3.9), Inches(1.8), Inches(2.3), desc, font_size=10, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 16)
    return slide


def slide_contact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Contact Us", font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Begin your journey to luxury property ownership today", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5))
    contact_items = [
        ("Phone", "+1 (212) 555-0199"),
        ("Email", "info@luxuryestates.com"),
        ("Website", "www.luxuryestates.com"),
        ("Office", "432 Park Avenue, Suite 2800\nNew York, NY 10022")
    ]
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(contact_items):
        y = Inches(2.0) + Inches(i * 0.95)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), y, Inches(1.3), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=12, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.2), y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.7), value, font_size=12, bold=False, color=WHITE)

    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(6.2), Inches(4.5))
    form_items = [
        ("Full Name", ""),
        ("Email Address", ""),
        ("Phone Number", ""),
        ("Property Interest", "Penthouse / Villa / Estate"),
        ("Message", "")
    ]
    for i, (label, placeholder) in enumerate(form_items):
        y = Inches(2.0) + Inches(i * 0.85)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.7), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=11, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(8.3), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(4.2), Inches(0.6))
        box.fill.solid()
        box.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        box.line.color.rgb = GOLD
        box.line.width = Pt(1)

    add_footer(slide, 17)
    return slide


def slide_thank_you(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(2.5), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Thank You", font_size=44, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.2))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "We look forward to helping you find your perfect property", font_size=18, bold=False, color=WHITE)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.2), Inches(3))
    contact_items = [
        ("Phone: +1 (212) 555-0199"),
        ("Email: info@luxuryestates.com"),
        ("Website: www.luxuryestates.com")
    ]
    for i, item in enumerate(contact_items):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.5) + Inches(i * 0.35), Inches(8), Inches(0.3), item, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 18)
    return slide


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = Inches(13.33)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(7.5)

    slide_title(prs)
    slide_introduction(prs)
    slide_portfolio_overview(prs)
    slide_property_1(prs)
    slide_property_2(prs)
    slide_property_3(prs)
    slide_property_4(prs)
    slide_market_trends(prs)
    slide_portfolio_distribution(prs)
    slide_investment_highlights(prs)
    slide_financial_performance(prs)
    slide_location_advantages(prs)
    slide_amenities(prs)
    slide_testimonials(prs)
    slide_team(prs)
    slide_process(prs)
    slide_contact(prs)
    slide_thank_you(prs)

    prs.save("Luxury_Property.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
